name: The Kodensha Co., Ltd.
summary: The Kodensha Co., Ltd. engages in the construction business in Japan. It constructs power plants, power transmission lines, high-rise buildings, houses, schools, hospitals, and factories. It also engages in design and construction of power receiving and transforming, power generation, power, lighting, communication information, monitoring / control, disaster prevention / security equipment, etc. in buildings, factories, condominiums, etc.; highway lighting and lighting work for various sports facilities; and aviation sign equipment construction. The company also undertakes construction, renewal, and maintenance works of transmission line facilities for electric power companies. In addition, it sells general-purpose electrical equipment, air conditioning equipment, elevator equipment, building equipment, security equipment, video surveillance systems, low temperature equipment, industrial mechatronics equipment, FA equipment, building management systems, etc. The company was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. The Kodensha Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Mitsubishi Electric Corporation.
